title: PropertyGraphData
description: The serialized property graph change data. The type field indicates the element kind.

id.description: The unique identifier of the element.

type.description: The element type: v (vertex), vl (vertex label), vp (vertex property), e (edge), ep (edge property).

value.description: The property value with its data type.

dataType.description: The data type (String, Integer, Double, etc.).
